zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hansard I於大約1377年出生在英國達勒姆瓦爾沃斯時，他的父親Sir Robert Hansard II25歲，母親Margaret  Gascoigne22歲。他和Joan Aske至少有3個兒子。他去世於1430年11月30日之後在英國林可爾史爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.West Lindsey District, Lincolnshire, Eng: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾素斯 凱爾西
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hansard I于大约1377年出生在英国達勒姆瓦爾沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hansard II25岁，母亲Margaret  Gascoigne22岁。他和Joan Aske至少有3个儿子。他去世于1430年11月30日之后在英国林可爾史爾，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hansard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): of Norman origin, from the Middle English and Old French personal name Ansard with prosthetic H-; from ancient Germanic ans- ‘(pagan) god’ + ward ‘guard, protector’ or hard- ‘brave, hardy’.

variants.name: Hazard
meanings: English: Anglo-Norman French variant of   Hansard  .

English and French: nickname from Old French, Middle English hasard, hazard ‘game of dice’, perhaps given to a player at hazard, i.e. a gambler, trickster, or rascal. The word probably derives from Arabic az-zahr, from az, assimilated form of the definite article al, + zahr ‘die’. It appears to have been picked up in the Holy Land and brought back to Europe by Provençal crusaders.
English: possibly in some instances of Flemish origin, a nickname from Middle Dutch hasart ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hansard I was born about 1377, in Walworth, Durham, England, his father, Sir Robert Hansard II, was 25 and his mother, Margaret  Gascoigne, was 22. He had at least 3 sons with Joan Aske. He died after 30 November 1430, in Lincolnshire, England, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hansard I est né environ 1377, à Walworth, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hansard II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret  Gascoigne, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Joan Aske. Il est décédé après 30 novembre 1430, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hansard I um 1377 in Walworth, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hansard II 25 und seine Mutter Margaret  Gascoigne 22. Er hatte mit Joan Aske mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 30. November 1430 in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hansard I è nato il circa 1377 nel Walworth, Durham, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hansard II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret  Gascoigne, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Joan Aske. Morì dopo il 30 novembre 1430, nel Lincolnshire, England, e fu sepolto a Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hansard Iが約1377年にイギリスダルハムワルウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hansard IIは25歳，母Margaret  Gascoigneは22歳であった。彼はJoan Askeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1430年11月30日以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hansard I(이)가 대략 1377년 영국 뒤람 월워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hansard II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret  Gascoigne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Joan Aske(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1430년 11월 30일 이후 영국 링코실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1377–after 30 November 1430: ойролцоогоор 1377 он–1430 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 30–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hansard I nasceu aproximadamente 1377, em Walworth, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hansard II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret  Gascoigne, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Joan Aske. Ele faleceu após 30 de novembro de 1430, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hansard I родился около 1377 г. в местности валворт, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hansard II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret  Gascoigne, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Joan Aske. Он умер после 30 ноябрь 1430 г. в местности линколншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1377–after 30 November 1430: e tusa o le 1377–ina ua ma'ea le 30 Novema 1430

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Hansard I nació aproximadamente 1377, en Walworth, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hansard II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret  Gascoigne, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Joan Aske. Murió después de 30 de noviembre de 1430, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
